content_preview.title: Yann LeCun's AMI Labs Raises $1.03 Billion in Europe's Largest Seed Round to Build World Models Beyond LLMs
content_preview.summary: Yann LeCun's Paris-based AMI Labs closes a $1.03 billion seed round at a $3.5 billion valuation to build world models using JEPA architecture as an alternative to LLMs.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
Advanced Machine Intelligence Labs, the Paris-based startup co-founded by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, has [raised $1.03 billion in seed funding](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/09/yann-lecuns-ami-labs-raises-1-03-billion-to-build-world-models/) at a $3.5 billion pre-money valuation, making it the largest seed round ever raised by a European startup.

The round, announced on March 10, was co-led by Cathay Innovation, Greycroft, Hiro Capital, HV Capital, and Bezos Expeditions. Additional partic...
